reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, la infraestructura está un poco abandonada... No tienen la app

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, but the infrastructure is a bit run-down... They don't have an app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2MzVld2RBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, como en todas las estaciones de servicio del Automovil Club. Edificio pequeño, no tienen un lugar destinado a comer o tomar algo.
Baños muy limpios.
Excelentes vistas.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, as at all Automobile Club service stations. The building is small, with no designated area for food or drinks.
Very clean bathrooms.
Excellent views.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2aDZLYXJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Salvavidas absoluto. Por ser del ACA, por tener una señora que atiende el barrio de una calidez total, y porque en otra ocasión, revisando, descubrieron que el auto que había alquilado, no tenía una gota de aceite. Pude haber fundido en medio de los 7 lagos

(Translated by Google)
An absolute lifesaver. Because it's a car rental agency, because there's a woman who runs the neighborhood with such warmth, and because on another occasion, during an inspection, they discovered that the car I'd rented didn't have a drop of oil. I could have broken down in the middle of the Seven Lakes.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias José por tu comentario. Nos gusta este trabajo y que nos visite como usted.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2Mi1QeVdREAE

reviews.comment:
Horrible estación de servicio, pésima atención en playa de servicio y los sandwich que nos vendieron eran del 2019, fueron incomibles y carísimos.

(Translated by Google)
Horrible gas station, terrible service at the pump and the sandwiches they sold us were from 2019, inedible and very expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2aTUzckJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Mal atendidos, empleado prepotente.Baños cerrados. Soy socia estoy pensando borrarme .30 de agosto 2021. 18 hs. Solicité libro de quejas no existe allí !

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, arrogant employee. Restrooms closed. I'm a member and I'm thinking of canceling my membership. August 30, 2021, 6 PM. I requested a complaints book, but it's not there!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2eG9MUnB3RRAB

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Gonza por el puntaje !! La próxima será un cinco.
